title: senecio doronicum subsp. lagascanus
intro: Senecio doronicum subsp. lagascanus, also known as yellow ragwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Senecio doronicum subsp. lagascanus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, but caution is advised as some parts of the plant contain pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which can be toxic in large quantities.
